---
title: "Team"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

## Jenna Baljunas <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0001-7197-2654"><img src="images/ORCID-iD.png" alt="ORCID Logo"/></a>

:::: {.columns .transect-layout}

::: {.column .left-panel}

::: {.text-center}
![](images/Bio_pic.JPG){width="70%"}

:::

:::

::: {.column .right-panel}


Hi! This project is part of my PhD dissertation at Michigan State University. There, I am part of the Department of Integrative Biology and Ecology, Evolution, & Behavior Program through the [Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab](https://www.communityecologylab.com/), led by Dr. Phoebe Zarnetske.

<div class="image-row">

  <a href="https://integrativebiology.natsci.msu.edu/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/IBIO_logo.png" width="200">
  </a>

  <a href="https://eeb.msu.edu/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/EEB_logo.jpg" width="200">
  </a>

</div>

:::

::::
